expectations.evidence: YAML uses only created, status, type fields as verified in manifest
Follows Source Ingest Workflow template structure
Without-skill agent used status: working for Knowledge notes instead of status: review. While working is valid per vault rules, the assertion requires review for AI-generated content.
Claim note evidence section references 'Table 2' without wikilinks like [[Paper - 2025 - SmolVLA]].
Paper - 2025 - SmolVLA, Claim - ..., Question - ... all follow naming conventions
Data cited from specific tables; no fabricated claims detected
Created Atomic (4 new), Claim (5), Question (2) - three distinct Knowledge types
